eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Mahoning, OH; at 1:15 PM on JUL 5, 2026 Effective until 9:15 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Mahoning County Alerts: Due to storm damage, please avoid the North Canfield and North Boardman areas while first responders respond to ongoing incidents and assess the damage.
